                                    PRIVATE ACCESS (ZPA) : UNDERSTANDING USER ACTIVITY LOG FIELDS




Private Access (ZPA)
Understanding User Activity Log Fields
The Log Streaming Service (LSS) can send User Activity log information to any third-party log analytics
tool. By default, the User Activity log type includes the fields listed in the following table for each log
template (i.e., CSV, JSON, TSV). While configuring your log receiver, you can edit the default log stream
content to capture only specific fields, and create a custom log template.
    View an example User Activity log.


      {"LogTimestamp": "Fri May 31 17:35:42 2019","Customer": "ANZ Team/zdemo in beta","Sess
      ionID": "SqyZIMkg0JTj7EABsvwA","ConnectionID": "SqyZIMkg0JTj7EABsvwA,Q+EjXGdrvbF2lPiBb
      edm","InternalReason": "","ConnectionStatus": "active","IPProtocol": 6,"DoubleEncrypti
      on": 0,"Username": "ZPA LSS Client","ServicePort": 10011,"ClientPublicIP": "34.209.18
      9.218","ClientPrivateIP": "","ClientLatitude": 45.000000,"ClientLongitude": -119.00000
      0,"ClientCountryCode": "US","ClientZEN": "broker1b.pdx2","Policy": "ANZ Lab Apps_1","C
      onnector": "ZDEMO ANZ Lab-1","ConnectorZEN": "broker1b.pdx2","ConnectorIP": "192.168.
      1.53","ConnectorPort": 60266,"Host": "192.168.1.57","Application": "ANZ Lab Apps","App
      Group": "ANZ Lab Apps","Server": "0","ServerIP": "192.168.1.57","ServerPort": 10011,"P
      olicyProcessingTime": 28,"CAProcessingTime": 1330,"ConnectorZENSetupTime": 191017,"Con
      nectionSetupTime": 192397,"ServerSetupTime": 465,"AppLearnTime": 0,"TimestampConnectio
      nStart": "2019-05-30T08:20:42.230Z","TimestampConnectionEnd": "","TimestampCATx": "201
      9-05-30T08:20:42.230Z","TimestampCARx": "2019-05-30T08:20:42.231Z","TimestampAppLearnS
      tart": "","TimestampZENFirstRxClient": "2019-05-30T08:20:42.424Z","TimestampZENFirstTx
      Client": "","TimestampZENLastRxClient": "2019-05-31T17:34:27.348Z","TimestampZENLastTx
      Client": "","TimestampConnectorZENSetupComplete": "2019-05-30T08:20:42.422Z","Timestam
      pZENFirstRxConnector": "","TimestampZENFirstTxConnector": "2019-05-30T08:20:42.424
      Z","TimestampZENLastRxConnector": "","TimestampZENLastTxConnector": "2019-05-31T17:34:
      27.348Z","ZENTotalBytesRxClient": 2406926,"ZENBytesRxClient": 7115,"ZENTotalBytesTxCli
      ent": 0,"ZENBytesTxClient": 0,"ZENTotalBytesRxConnector": 0,"ZENBytesRxConnector":
      0,"ZENTotalBytesTxConnector": 2406926,"ZENBytesTxConnector": 7115,"Idp": "Example IDP
      Config", "ClientToClient": "0", "ClientCity": "San Jose", "MicroTenantID": "1452574807
      99129312", "AppMicrotenantID": "145257480799129312", "Platform": "windows", "Hostnam
      e": "DESKTOP-P669MN4", "PRAApprovalID": "15787", "PRACapabilityPolicyID": "72057597259
      256663", "PRAConsoleType": "SSH", "PRACredentialUserName": "SafemarchUser", "PRACreden
      tialLoginType": "Username-Password", "PRACredentialPolicyID": "72057597259256964", "PR
      AConnectionID": "$b381e220-fb0f-4dc5-9c2a-e3e0fb2e5efb", "PRAErrorStatus": "Upstream E
      rror", "PRAFileTransferList": "{\"file_list\":[{\"name\":\"\\/d546509ab6670f9ff31783ed
      72875dfc0f37fa2b666bd5870eecaaed2ebea4a8.elf\",\"action\":\"Upload\",\"status\":\"Insp
      ection denied upload\",\"start_ts\":1704225544,\"end_ts\":1704225547,\"inspected\":\"T
      rue\",\"file_type\":\"elf\",\"md5\":\"4DDE761681684D7EDAD4E5E1FFDB940B\",\"inspection_
      verdict\":\"{\\n\\t\\\"code\\\": 200,\\n\\t\\\"message\\\": \\\"response OK\\\",\\n\\t
      \\\"virusName\\\": \\\"iot.trojan.gafgyt.botnet\\\",\\n\\t\\\"virusType\\\": \\\"Virus
      \\\",\\n\\t\\\"fileType\\\": \\\"elf\\\",\\n\\t\\\"md5\\\": \\\"4DDE761681684D7EDAD4E5
      E1FFDB940B\\\",\\n\\t\\\"sandboxSubmission\\\": \\\"Virus\\\"\\n}\",\"inspection_time
      \":\"less than 1 second\"},{\"name\":\"\\/4ce39251817198bbec7b84782507394e7d68bfe3a79b


                                                                              ©2026 Zscaler, Inc. All rights reserved.   1
                                   PRIVATE ACCESS (ZPA) : UNDERSTANDING USER ACTIVITY LOG FIELDS




         89be363f0c1e05558ef1.zip\",\"action\":\"Upload\",\"status\":\"Inspection denied upload
         \",\"start_ts\":1704225552,\"end_ts\":1704225557,\"inspected\":\"True\",\"file_type
         \":\"zip\",\"md5\":\"F5F7995BACD88A4BCF2D69DF063184AB\",\"inspection_verdict\":\"{\\n
         \\t\\\"code\\\": 200,\\n\\t\\\"message\\\": \\\"File not submitted to Sandbox\\\",\\n
         \\t\\\"fileType\\\": \\\"zip\\\",\\n\\t\\\"md5\\\": \\\"F5F7995BACD88A4BCF2D69DF063184
         AB\\\",\\n\\t\\\"sandboxSubmission\\\": \\\"File not Submitted to Sandbox\\\"\\n}
         \",\"inspection_time\":\"less than 1 second\"},{\"name\":\"\\/4ce39251817198bbec7b8478
         2507394e7d68bfe3a79b89be363f0c1e05558ef1.xlsx\",\"action\":\"Upload\",\"status\":\"Ins
         pection denied upload\",\"start_ts\":1704225568,\"end_ts\":1704225573,\"inspected
         \":\"True\",\"file_type\":\"xlsx\",\"md5\":\"FF43FB09E69439FCD3DD8196F5BCE11F\",\"insp
         ection_verdict\":\"{\\n\\t\\\"code\\\": 200,\\n\\t\\\"message\\\": \\\"response OK
         \\\",\\n\\t\\\"virusName\\\": \\\"xls.downloader.qakbot\\\",\\n\\t\\\"virusType\\\":
         \\\"Sandbox Malware\\\",\\n\\t\\\"fileType\\\": \\\"xlsx\\\",\\n\\t\\\"md5\\\": \\\"FF
         43FB09E69439FCD3DD8196F5BCE11F\\\",\\n\\t\\\"sandboxSubmission\\\": \\\"Sandbox Malwar
         e\\\"\\n}\",\"inspection_time\":\"less than 1 second\"},{\"name\":\"\\/Populate_Existi
         ng_Flags_And_Overrides.xlsx\",\"action\":\"Upload\",\"status\":\"Success\",\"start_ts
         \":1704225591,\"end_ts\":1704225593,\"inspected\":\"True\",\"file_type\":\"xlsx\",\"md
         5\":\"D1A0596352BE4A1260B0419C7046F8FA\",\"inspection_verdict\":\"{\\n\\t\\\"code\\\":
         200,\\n\\t\\\"message\\\": \\\"No active content found. File not suspicious\\\",\\n\\t
         \\\"fileType\\\": \\\"xlsx\\\",\\n\\t\\\"md5\\\": \\\"D1A0596352BE4A1260B0419C7046F8FA
         \\\",\\n\\t\\\"sandboxSubmission\\\": \\\"File not Submitted to Sandbox\\\"\\n}\",\"in
         spection_time\":\"less than 1 second\"}]}", "PRARecordingStatus": "Available", "PRASha
         redUserList": "{\"shared_user_list\":[{\"name\":\"lisa@zerotrust.to\"}]}", "PRASession
         Type": "PRA", "PRASharedMode": "control"}




The following table includes descriptions and supported field format specifications for each field within
the template. To learn more about the format specifications listed for each field, including examples,
see Understanding the Log Stream Content Format.

                                                                        Supported Field Format
 Field                              Description                         Specifications
                                                                             %[OPT]s
                                                                             %[OPT]j
 AppGroup                           The application group name               %[OPT]J
                                                                             %[OPT]o

                                    The time in microseconds taken
                                    for App Connectors to learn              %[OPT]s
                                    about the requested application          %[OPT]j
 AppLearnTime
                                    and report the learned                   %[OPT]J
                                    information to the central
                                    authority

                                                                             ©2026 Zscaler, Inc. All rights reserved.   2
                    PRIVATE ACCESS (ZPA) : UNDERSTANDING USER ACTIVITY LOG FIELDS




                                                      Supported Field Format
Field               Description                       Specifications
                                                          %[OPT]s
                                                          %[OPT]j
Application         The application name                  %[OPT]J
                                                          %[OPT]o

                    The Microtenant ID of the             %[OPT]s
AppMicroTenantID                                          %[OPT]j
                    application

                    The time in microseconds taken        %[OPT]s
CAProcessingTime    for processing in the central         %[OPT]j
                    authority                             %[OPT]J

                                                          %[OPT]s
                    The country code of the               %[OPT]j
ClientCountryCode   Zscaler Client Connector              %[OPT]J
                    location                              %[OPT]o

                    The latitude coordinate of the        %[OPT]f
ClientLatitude      Zscaler Client Connector              %[OPT]o
                    location
                    The longitude coordinate of the       %[OPT]f
ClientLongitude     Zscaler Client Connector              %[OPT]o
                    location
                                                          %[OPT]s
                    The private IP address of the         %[OPT]j
ClientPrivateIP                                           %[OPT]J
                    Zscaler Client Connector
                                                          %[OPT]o

                                                          %[OPT]s
                    The public IP address of the          %[OPT]j
ClientPublicIP                                            %[OPT]J
                    Zscaler Client Connector
                                                          %[OPT]o


                                                          ©2026 Zscaler, Inc. All rights reserved.   3
                      PRIVATE ACCESS (ZPA) : UNDERSTANDING USER ACTIVITY LOG FIELDS




                                                      Supported Field Format
Field                 Description                     Specifications
                                                          %[OPT]s
ClientCity            The city of the client              %[OPT]j

                      The status of the client-to-        %[OPT]s
ClientToClient
                      client connection

                      The Public Service Edge for         %[OPT]s
                      Private Access that received        %[OPT]j
ClientZEN                                                 %[OPT]J
                      the request from the Zscaler
                      Client Connector                    %[OPT]o

                                                          %[OPT]s
                                                          %[OPT]j
ConnectionID          The application connection ID       %[OPT]J
                                                          %[OPT]o

                      The time taken by the App
                      Connector to process a
                      notification from the App           %[OPT]s
ConnectionSetupTime   Connector selection                 %[OPT]j
                      microservice and set up the         %[OPT]J
                      connection to the application
                      server
                      The status of the connection.
                      The expected values for this        %[OPT]s
                      field are:                          %[OPT]j
ConnectionStatus                                          %[OPT]J
                           Open
                           Close                          %[OPT]o
                           Active

                                                         Supported Field Format
Field                   Description                      Specifications
                                                             %[OPT]s
                                                             %[OPT]j
Connector               The App Connector name               %[OPT]J
                                                             %[OPT]o

                                                             %[OPT]s
                        The source IP address of the         %[OPT]j
ConnectorIP                                                  %[OPT]J
                        App Connector
                                                             %[OPT]o

                                                             %[OPT]d
                        The source port of the App           %[OPT]x
ConnectorPort                                                %[OPT]f
                        Connector
                                                             %[OPT]o

                                                             %[OPT]s
                        The Public Service Edge that         %[OPT]j
ConnectorZEN            sent the request from the App        %[OPT]J
                        Connector                            %[OPT]o

                        The time in microseconds taken       %[OPT]s
                        for setting up the connection        %[OPT]j
ConnectorZENSetupTime
                        between the App Connector            %[OPT]J
                        and Public Service Edge
                                                             %[OPT]s
                                                             %[OPT]j
Customer                The customer name                    %[OPT]J
                                                             %[OPT]o

DoubleEncryption        The double encryption status.        %[OPT]s
                        The expected values for this         %[OPT]j
                        field are:                           %[OPT]J
                                                             %[OPT]o
                             On

                                                             ©2026 Zscaler, Inc. All rights reserved.   5
                 PRIVATE ACCESS (ZPA) : UNDERSTANDING USER ACTIVITY LOG FIELDS




                                                   Supported Field Format
Field            Description                       Specifications
                      Off

                                                       %[OPT]s
                 The destination host domain or        %[OPT]j
Host                                                   %[OPT]J
                 IP address
                                                       %[OPT]o

                 The name of the device as
                 reported by Zscaler Client            %[OPT]s
                 Connector. This field only            %[OPT]j
Hostname                                               %[OPT]J
                 provides valid values for
                 Zscaler Client Connector and          %[OPT]o
                 machine tunnel client types.
                                                       %[OPT]s
                 The name of the identity              %[OPT]j
Idp              provider (IdP) as configured in       %[OPT]J
                 the Zscaler Admin Console             %[OPT]o

                                                       %[OPT]s
                 The internal reason for the           %[OPT]j
InternalReason                                         %[OPT]J
                 status of the transaction
                                                       %[OPT]o

                                                       %[OPT]s
                                                       %[OPT]j
IPProtocol       The IP protocol number                %[OPT]J
                                                       %[OPT]o

                                                       %[OPT]s
                 The timestamp when the log            %[OPT]j
LogTimestamp
                 was generated                         %[OPT]J

                                                         Supported Field Format
Field                   Description                      Specifications

                        The Microtenant ID of the user       %[OPT]s
MicroTenantID                                                %[OPT]j
                        accessing the application

                                                             %[OPT]s
                        The platform on the device as        %[OPT]j
Platform                reported by Zscaler Client           %[OPT]J
                        Connector (e.g., Windows)            %[OPT]o

                                                             %[OPT]s
                                                             %[OPT]j
Policy                  The access policy rule name          %[OPT]J
                                                             %[OPT]o

                        The time in microseconds taken       %[OPT]s
                        for processing the access            %[OPT]j
PolicyProcessingTime
                        policy associated with the           %[OPT]J
                        application
                                                             %[OPT]d
                                                             %[OPT]x
PRAApprovalID           The privileged approval ID           %[OPT]f
                                                             %[OPT]o

                                                             %[OPT]d
                        The privileged capabilities          %[OPT]x
PRACapabilityPolicyID                                        %[OPT]f
                        policy ID
                                                             %[OPT]o

                                                             %[OPT]s
                        The Privileged Remote Access         %[OPT]j
PRAConnectionID                                              %[OPT]J
                        (PRA) connection ID
                                                             %[OPT]o

                                                            Supported Field Format
Field                    Description                        Specifications
                         The privileged console type.
                         The expected values for this           %[OPT]s
                         field are:                             %[OPT]j
PRAConsoleType                                                  %[OPT]J
                              RDP
                              SSH                               %[OPT]o
                              VNC

                         The login type of the privileged
                         credential. The expected values        %[OPT]s
                         for this field are:                    %[OPT]j
PRACredentialLoginType                                          %[OPT]J
                              Username/Password
                              SSH Key                           %[OPT]o
                              Password

                                                                %[OPT]d
                         The privileged credential policy       %[OPT]x
PRACredentialPolicyID                                           %[OPT]f
                         ID
                                                                %[OPT]o

                                                                %[OPT]s
                         The name of the user that is           %[OPT]j
PRACredentialUserName    logged in to the target                %[OPT]J
                         privileged console                     %[OPT]o

                                                                %[OPT]s
                         The PRA session error status, if       %[OPT]j
PRAErrorStatus                                                  %[OPT]J
                         available
                                                                %[OPT]o




                                                                ©2026 Zscaler, Inc. All rights reserved.   8
                      PRIVATE ACCESS (ZPA) : UNDERSTANDING USER ACTIVITY LOG FIELDS




                                                         Supported Field Format
Field                 Description                        Specifications
                                                             %[OPT]s
                      The files transferred during the       %[OPT]j
PRAFileTransferList                                          %[OPT]J
                      PRA session
                                                             %[OPT]o

                      The recording status of the PRA
                      file transfer. The expected            %[OPT]s
                      values for this field are:             %[OPT]j
PRARecordingStatus                                           %[OPT]J
                           Available
                           Not Available                     %[OPT]o
                           Started

                                                             %[OPT]s
                      The PRA session type. The              %[OPT]j
PRASessionType                                               %[OPT]J
                      expected value is PRA.
                                                             %[OPT]o

                      The PRA shared mode. The
                      expected values for this field         %[OPT]s
                      are:                                   %[OPT]j
PRASharedMode                                                %[OPT]J
                           Monitor                           %[OPT]o
                           Control

                                                             %[OPT]s
                      The users that the PRA session         %[OPT]j
PRASharedUserList                                            %[OPT]J
                      was shared with
                                                             %[OPT]o

                      The server ID name. The server         %[OPT]s
                      ID must be set to zero if              %[OPT]j
Server                                                       %[OPT]J
                      Dynamic Server Discovery is
                      enabled.                               %[OPT]o

                                                             Supported Field Format
Field                      Description                       Specifications
                                                                 %[OPT]s
                           The destination IP address of         %[OPT]j
ServerIP                                                         %[OPT]J
                           the server
                                                                 %[OPT]o

                                                                 %[OPT]d
                           The destination port of the           %[OPT]x
ServerPort                                                       %[OPT]f
                           server
                                                                 %[OPT]o

                           The time in microseconds taken        %[OPT]s
ServerSetupTime            to set up the connection at the       %[OPT]j
                           server                                %[OPT]J

                                                                 %[OPT]d
                           The service port associated           %[OPT]x
ServicePort                                                      %[OPT]f
                           with the application request
                                                                 %[OPT]o

                                                                 %[OPT]s
                                                                 %[OPT]j
SessionID                  The TLS session ID                    %[OPT]J
                                                                 %[OPT]o

                           The timestamp in microseconds
                           when the Public Service Edge
                           or Private Service Edge for           %[OPT]s
TimestampConnectionStart   Private Access received the           %[OPT]j
                           initial request from Zscaler          %[OPT]J
                           Client Connector to start the
                           connection
TimestampConnectionEnd     The timestamp in microseconds         %[OPT]s
                           when the Public Service Edge          %[OPT]j

                                                                 Supported Field Format
Field                       Description                          Specifications
                            or Private Service Edge                  %[OPT]J
                            terminated the connection
                            The timestamp in microseconds            %[OPT]s
                            when the central authority sent          %[OPT]j
TimestampCATx
                            a request to the Public Service          %[OPT]J
                            Edge or Private Service Edge
                            The timestamp in microseconds
                            when the central authority               %[OPT]s
TimestampCARx               received a request from the              %[OPT]j
                            Public Service Edge or Private           %[OPT]J
                            Service Edge
                            The timestamp in microseconds            %[OPT]s
                            when Private Access services             %[OPT]j
TimestampAppLearnStart
                            start the process to learn about         %[OPT]J
                            an application

                            The timestamp in microseconds            %[OPT]d
                            when the Public Service Edge             %[OPT]x
TimestampZENFirstRxClient                                            %[OPT]f
                            received the first byte from the
                            Zscaler Client Connector                 %[OPT]o

                            The timestamp in microseconds            %[OPT]d
                            when the Public Service Edge             %[OPT]x
TimestampZENFirstTxClient                                            %[OPT]f
                            sent the first byte to the Zscaler
                            Client Connector                         %[OPT]o

                            when the Public Service Edge             %[OPT]j

                            Zscaler Client Connector

                                                                  Supported Field Format
Field                         Description                         Specifications
                              The timestamp in microseconds           %[OPT]s
                              when the Public Service Edge            %[OPT]j
TimestampZENLastTxClient
                              sent the last byte to the Zscaler       %[OPT]J
                              Client Connector
                              The timestamp in microseconds
                              when the Public Service Edge
                              received a request from the
                              App Connector to set up a data          %[OPT]s
TimestampConnectorZENSetup                                            %[OPT]j
                              connection. The request from
Complete                                                              %[OPT]J
                              the App Connector is triggered
                              by the initial request for a
                              specific application from
                              Zscaler Client Connector.

                              The timestamp in microseconds           %[OPT]d
TimestampZENFirstRxConnecto   when the Public Service Edge            %[OPT]x
r                             received the first byte from the        %[OPT]f
                              App Connector                           %[OPT]o

                              The timestamp in microseconds           %[OPT]d
TimestampZENFirstTxConnecto   when the Public Service Edge            %[OPT]x
r                             sent the first byte to the App          %[OPT]f
                              Connector                               %[OPT]o

                              The timestamp in microseconds           %[OPT]s
TimestampZENLastRxConnecto    when the Public Service Edge            %[OPT]j
r                             received the last byte from the         %[OPT]J
                              App Connector
                              The timestamp in microseconds           %[OPT]s
TimestampZENLastTxConnecto    when the Public Service Edge            %[OPT]j
r                             sent the last byte to the App           %[OPT]J
                              Connector

                                                          Supported Field Format
Field                   Description                       Specifications
                                                              %[OPT]s
                        The username as entered into          %[OPT]j
Username                                                      %[OPT]J
                        Zscaler Client Connector
                                                              %[OPT]o

                                                              %[OPT]d
                        The additional bytes received         %[OPT]x
ZENBytesRxClient        from Zscaler Client Connector         %[OPT]f
                        since the last transaction log        %[OPT]o

                        The additional bytes                  %[OPT]d
                        transmitted to Zscaler Client         %[OPT]x
ZENBytesTxClient                                              %[OPT]f
                        Connector since the last
                        transaction log                       %[OPT]o

                                                              %[OPT]d
                        The additional bytes received         %[OPT]x
ZENBytesRxConnector     from the App Connector since          %[OPT]f
                        the last transaction log              %[OPT]o

                        The additional bytes                  %[OPT]d
                        transmitted by the App                %[OPT]x
ZENBytesTxConnector                                           %[OPT]f
                        Connector since the last
                        transaction log                       %[OPT]o

                                                              %[OPT]d
                        The total bytes received from         %[OPT]x
ZENTotalBytesRxClient   Zscaler Client Connector by the       %[OPT]f
                        Public Service Edge                   %[OPT]o




                                                              ©2026 Zscaler, Inc. All rights reserved.   13
                           PRIVATE ACCESS (ZPA) : UNDERSTANDING USER ACTIVITY LOG FIELDS




                                                            Supported Field Format
Field                      Description                      Specifications
                                                                %[OPT]d
                           The total bytes transmitted to       %[OPT]x
ZENTotalBytesTxClient      Zscaler Client Connector from        %[OPT]f
                           the Public Service Edge              %[OPT]o

                                                                %[OPT]d
                           The total bytes received from        %[OPT]x
ZENTotalBytesRxConnector   the App Connector by the             %[OPT]f
                           Public Service Edge                  %[OPT]o

                                                                %[OPT]d
                           The total bytes transmitted to       %[OPT]x
ZENTotalBytesTxConnector   the App Connector from the           %[OPT]f
                           Public Service Edge                  %[OPT]o




                                                                ©2026 Zscaler, Inc. All rights reserved.   14
